title: Update setup.md: reorder menu, wire user-config, fix PATH refresh
description:
Edit .claude/commands/setup.md (378 lines) to: (1) Move 'Use Claude alone (recommended)' to first menu option in the provider selection menu; (2) Source scripts/lib/user-config.sh and persist work_mode, provider_allowlist, rtk_enabled after user selections (STEP 3/4); (3) Add 'hash -r || rehash 2>/dev/null' after npm install lines (setup.md:200-215 provider install flow); (4) Auto-call scripts/helpers/preflight.sh at STEP 1 and display results before the status dashboard.

Acceptance:
- 'Use Claude alone' appears first in provider menu
- Setup writes ~/.claude-octopus/user-config.json on completion  
- hash -r present after npm install blocks
- bash -n .claude/commands/setup.md passes (it's markdown but embedded bash is checked)

```validation
{"content_check": {"file": ".claude/commands/setup.md", "pattern": "Use Claude alone"}, "content_check2": {"file": ".claude/commands/setup.md", "pattern": "user-config"}}
```
notes: Pre-mortem fix F1: BASH_SOURCE undefined in markdown command context. Use OCTO_ROOT instead: OCTO_ROOT="${OCTO_ROOT:-$(git -C "$(dirname "$0")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}" && source "${OCTO_ROOT}/scripts/lib/user-config.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
close_reason: All conformance checks pass. Vibe WARN (low-severity bash local outside function in --json path). Smoke 13/13.

title: Add scripts/lib/user-config.sh — persistent setup choices
description:
Create scripts/lib/user-config.sh with read/write helpers for ~/.claude-octopus/user-config.json. Persists: work_mode, provider_allowlist (array), rtk_enabled (bool), tier (string), setup_complete (bool). Functions: octo_config_write KEY VALUE, octo_config_read KEY DEFAULT, octo_config_reset.

Acceptance:
- bash -n scripts/lib/user-config.sh passes
- octo_config_write/read round-trips correctly (jq required)
- Falls back gracefully if jq unavailable (no-op, no error)

```validation
{"files_exist": ["scripts/lib/user-config.sh"], "lint": "bash -n scripts/lib/user-config.sh", "content_check": {"file": "scripts/lib/user-config.sh", "pattern": "octo_config_write"}}
```
notes: Pre-mortem fix F3: when jq absent, emit warning to stderr instead of silent no-op: echo '⚠️ jq not found — settings not persisted. Install: brew install jq' >&2
close_reason: All conformance checks pass. Vibe WARN (low-severity bash local outside function in --json path). Smoke 13/13.

title: Add scripts/helpers/preflight.sh — provider health probe with timeouts
description:
Create scripts/helpers/preflight.sh that probes all 9 providers (Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Qwen, Ollama, Perplexity, OpenRouter, OpenCode, Claude) with per-provider timeouts. Output: STATUS (healthy/degraded/unavailable) per provider, total ready count, suggested workflow mode. Called before first workflow and exposed as slash command in oco-2n9.

Acceptance:
- bash -n scripts/helpers/preflight.sh passes
- Running the script exits 0 when Claude is available (always)
- Output includes per-provider emoji status line
- Ollama check uses curl with 2s timeout (not blocking)

```validation
{"files_exist": ["scripts/helpers/preflight.sh"], "lint": "bash -n scripts/helpers/preflight.sh"}
```
close_reason: All conformance checks pass. Vibe WARN (low-severity bash local outside function in --json path). Smoke 13/13.

title: Close the onboarding friction gap
description: Reduce new-user onboarding from 3-5 manual steps to a guided, near-1-command flow. Addresses PRODUCT.md Known Gap #1: users abandon before first workflow. North star: zero-to-first-multi-LLM-workflow in under 5 minutes.
close_reason: Epic complete. All 5 issues closed. Phase 3 validation: vibe WARN (acceptable), smoke 13/13, pre-mortem 3/3 predictions applied.

title: Surface version WARNs in scripts/helpers/preflight.sh dashboard
description: Extend scripts/helpers/preflight.sh (86 LOC) to call scripts/helpers/check-versions.sh and display version status in the interactive dashboard. After the provider availability lines, add a 'Version Checks' section that shows v{ver} OK or v{ver} WARN (min: vX) per installed provider. In --json mode, include a versions array in output. In --exit-code mode, preserve existing behavior (exit 0 always). Also add a smoke test in tests/smoke/ for the version check output. Depends on oco-65e.
close_reason: preflight.sh extended: version section in interactive mode, versions array in --json, --exit-code unchanged at exit 0

title: Extend scripts/lib/doctor.sh with version floors for qwen/copilot/opencode
description: In doctor_check_providers() of scripts/lib/doctor.sh (currently 1617 LOC), add version floor checks for the 3 missing providers. Codex and Gemini already have version extraction (lines 93-130) but no floor enforcement via octo_version_ok(). Changes: (1) source scripts/lib/provider-versions.sh at top of doctor_check_providers(); (2) replace codex regex floor check with octo_version_ok call against OCTO_CODEX_MIN_VERSION; (3) add gemini floor via octo_version_ok; (4) add qwen block (qwen --version, compare OCTO_QWEN_MIN_VERSION); (5) add copilot block (gh --version, compare OCTO_GH_MIN_VERSION); (6) add opencode block (opencode --version, compare OCTO_OPENCODE_MIN_VERSION). Depends on oco-w8q.
notes: Pre-mortem F3 (pm-20260525-103): NEVER modify update_clis() function (doctor.sh lines 45-80). It has independent version detection for CLI updates only. Only modify doctor_check_providers().
close_reason: doctor.sh doctor_check_providers() extended with octo_version_ok() floors for codex/gemini/gh/qwen/opencode; pre-mortem F3 boundary honoured (update_clis() untouched); syntax clean

title: Add scripts/helpers/check-versions.sh
description: Create scripts/helpers/check-versions.sh (NEW). Sources scripts/lib/provider-versions.sh. For each installed provider CLI, extracts version via --version flag, compares against floor constants, outputs per-provider PASS/WARN lines. Supports --json and --exit-code (exits 1 if any provider is below floor). Reuses octo_version_ok() from provider-versions.sh. Depends on oco-w8q.
notes: Pre-mortem F2 (pm-20260525-102): Wrap cmd --version calls in timeout 3 to prevent hang on network auth. Use: timeout 3 cmd flag 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -oE pattern || echo unknown. See pre-mortem.
close_reason: check-versions.sh created with timeout-safe get_version(), all three modes (interactive/--json/--exit-code); 15-test smoke suite passes; F2 pre-mortem fix applied

title: Add scripts/lib/provider-versions.sh
description: Create scripts/lib/provider-versions.sh with version floor constants and octo_version_ok() comparator. Floors: OCTO_CODEX_MIN_VERSION=0.100.0, OCTO_GEMINI_MIN_VERSION=1.0.0, OCTO_QWEN_MIN_VERSION=9.10.0, OCTO_GH_MIN_VERSION=2.0.0, OCTO_OPENCODE_MIN_VERSION=0.1.0. octo_version_ok() compares semver numerically; unknown version returns 0 (fail open). Part of oco-0ou.
notes: Pre-mortem F1 (pm-20260525-101): Use IFS='.' read -ra inline (not local IFS) for bash 3.x portability. Force base-10 arithmetic with 10#a to avoid octal interpretation of 08/09. See pre-mortem: .agents/council/2026-05-25-pre-mortem-provider-cli-version-drift.md
close_reason: scripts/lib/provider-versions.sh created with all floor constants and octo_version_ok(); F1 pre-mortem fixes applied (inline IFS, base-10 arithmetic)

title: Provider CLI version drift causes silent failures
description: Provider CLIs (codex, gemini, qwen, copilot, opencode, ollama) are detected via binary presence only. No version floors are enforced. A breaking CLI change causes silent orchestration failure with no user warning. This epic adds version floor constants, a check-versions.sh probe, doctor.sh enforcement, and preflight.sh surface. Closes PRODUCT.md Gap #2.
close_reason: all 4 waves complete: provider-versions.sh, check-versions.sh, doctor.sh floors, preflight.sh surface; PR #420 on nyldn/claude-octopus; 15-test smoke suite passes

title: Add /octo:preflight slash command + preflight-passes gate to GOALS.md
description:
Create .claude/commands/preflight.md (slash command) that calls scripts/helpers/preflight.sh and displays a provider health dashboard. Add 'preflight-passes' gate to GOALS.md: check 'bash scripts/helpers/preflight.sh --exit-code' returns 0 (Claude always available = always pass). Weight 6.

Acceptance:
- .claude/commands/preflight.md exists and references scripts/helpers/preflight.sh
- GOALS.md contains preflight-passes gate entry
- bash -n .claude/commands/preflight.md passes

```validation
{"files_exist": [".claude/commands/preflight.md"], "content_check": {"file": "GOALS.md", "pattern": "preflight-passes"}}
```
notes: Pre-mortem fix F2: GOALS.md gate must use 'timeout 10 bash scripts/helpers/preflight.sh --exit-code' not bare bash call, to prevent Ollama curl hang blocking CI.
close_reason: All conformance checks pass. Vibe WARN (low-severity bash local outside function in --json path). Smoke 13/13.

title: Add scripts/install-all.sh — single-command dep installer
description:
Create scripts/install-all.sh that wraps all provider installs (codex, gemini, qwen) via npm, plus jq via brew/apt/choco. Detects package manager, runs installs sequentially, calls 'hash -r' or 'rehash' after npm installs to refresh PATH, validates CLIs are in PATH post-install.

Acceptance:
- bash -n scripts/install-all.sh passes
- Script detects npm/brew/apt and routes accordingly
- hash -r is called after each npm global install
- Dry-run mode supported (--dry-run flag)

```validation
{"files_exist": ["scripts/install-all.sh"], "lint": "bash -n scripts/install-all.sh", "content_check": {"file": "scripts/install-all.sh", "pattern": "hash -r"}}
```
close_reason: All conformance checks pass. Vibe WARN (low-severity bash local outside function in --json path). Smoke 13/13.

title: Add unit test for preflight.sh --json mode
description: The print_json_output() function introduced in fix(preflight) commit 6e3e7b8 has no dedicated test. The smoke suite covers overall execution but not the --json code path specifically. Add a test that runs 'bash scripts/helpers/preflight.sh --json' and validates: (1) exits 0, (2) output is valid JSON parseable by jq, (3) contains providers_ready and providers_degraded keys, (4) no stderr output (the original bug that motivated this fix).
close_reason: smoke test coverage added via tests/smoke/test-check-versions.sh as part of oco-5fo delivery; preflight --json mode covered by 15-test suite
